summary: Comprehensive testing of DPM Beauty Pageant 2025 landing page completed. All major features working correctly including popup auto-show, application form flow, social proof notifications, FAQ accordion, and backend integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Popup close button has overlay interception issues - difficult to click
ui_bugs.workaround: Escape key doesn't work either, but popup auto-closes after form submission

ui_bugs.issue: Testimonial names are in uppercase (KAVYA NAIR) instead of proper case (Kavya Nair)
ui_bugs.note: Names are correct but formatting could be improved

passed_tests: Rules section uses bullet points (ul with disc)
Popup auto-shows after 5 seconds with sessionStorage check
Apply buttons (12 found) successfully open popup form
3-step application form with all required fields
Payment simulation and thank you page flow
FAQ section with 10 questions and working accordion
Trust badges bar (4 badges: Secure Payment, Verified, Applied This Week, Satisfaction Rate)
Spots remaining indicator with red pulse dot
Real photos in all sections (judges, categories, past events, testimonials, about)
Social proof notifications with Indian names appearing every 12 seconds
Sticky navigation and footer bar working
All images replaced with real Unsplash/Pexels photos
Testimonials have correct names (Kavya Nair, Arjun Mehra, Sneha Gupta)
